jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Noise
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Noise! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Noise:
Noise is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise!
